content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Bubble Sort Graph". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/340/problem/D
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of elements in the array. The second line contains n space-separated integers.
content.outputFormat: The output should be the number of inversions in the array after sorting it using bubble sort.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use bubble sort to sort the array and count the inversions.
